title: Amtech S1490 Large Heavy Duty Sink Plunger
features: HEAVY DUTY: This extra-large plunger with a 160mm (6.5") diameter head is ideal for unblocking kitchen and bathroom sinks as well as waste disposal units
EASY TO USE AND CLEAN: Easy to use, it is made from polypropylene and is easy to clean with bleach and water
EASY TO HANDLE: Ergonomic build supports fatigue-free use
LIGHTWEIGHT TOOL: Easy to carry and operate throughout the day
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
description: From the manufacturer Slow draining showers, as well as, kitchen and bathroom sink blockages are quite common issues that we all face day-to-day. This Amtech sink plunger will essentially help alleviate all your clogged plug holes. Simply apply the plunger over the drain and after two to three pumping actions, the blockage will be removed. You need to follow the same method as a traditional plunger, but this plunger will produce much greater pressure or volume of air which is 8 times more powerful than the traditional one. It’s also easy to clean and recyclable. The Amtech Plunger is an ideal plunger for removing any kind of blockage. In fact, you can use this plunger when your shower tray is full. Within a few pumps, the cause of the blockage in the plug hole will be removed. If you are using the plunger to clear sinks or baths where there is an overflow, then before proceeding further, block the sink with a damp cloth. This will stop the air from coming out and makes the process much easier. Instructions · Apply the plunger on the drain even when the shower tray is full. · Press down on the bellows when it is over the plug and force the trapped air to come down the plughole. · Repeat this process two or three times. · Within a few pump actions, the cause of the blockage will be removed. Features Cleaning is easy It is made up of polypropylene which makes the product easy to clean. Just spray it with bleach and after run it under the tap/shower. Faster You need to place the large opening over the clogged plug and pump it twice. It will clear blockage faster than any other plunger. Multi-Use The plunger is of large size with 470mm of height. Hence you can use this item not only for kitchen basins, but also for bathroom sinks and other waste disposable units. Wider Sink Because of its wide diameter 160mm, you can use this plunger for the wider sink to remove blockages.
